raw_consumer_statement: I received an email from the company, stating that I owed a balance. I called the company and informed them that I did not make the purchase. I never had the new card activated. I explained that to them and informed them the purchases were not made by me and I have no idea how the purchases were made when I had the card in my possession. They opened an investigation and about a month later, I received a new bill with the charges put back on the account and was told I was held responsible and if I did not pay, they would report it on my credit report. No other information was provided by them. The card had a charge to XXXX XXXX for {$44.00}, on XX/XX/2023, a charge for XXXX {$110.00} on XX/XX/2023, XXXX for {$110.00} on XX/XX/2023 and a charge to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for {$100.00} on XX/XX/2023.
